title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pune University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pune University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
